name: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG
description: The high-performance-network team is responsible for the development and maintenance of network acceleration technology in openeuler community

name: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG 代码仓库列表
description: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG 维护的 25 个代码仓库，涵盖 网络 领域

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG（Special Interest Group，特别兴趣小组）负责 The high-performance-network team is responsible for the development and maintenance of network acceleration technology in openeuler community。该 SIG 共有 19 名核心成员，维护 25 个代码仓库，属于 网络 领域。

mainEntity.name: 如何参与 openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG？

acceptedAnswer.text: 参与 openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG 的方式：1）向相关仓库（如 src-openeuler/libvma、src-openeuler/polycube、src-openeuler/cilium）提交 Pull Request；2）订阅邮件列表 high-performance-network@openeuler.org dev@openeuler.org；3）参加 SIG 定期工作会议，会议信息见 openEuler 官网活动日历。

mainEntity.name: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG 包含哪些代码仓库？

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG 共维护 25 个代码仓库，主要包括：src-openeuler/libvma、src-openeuler/polycube、src-openeuler/cilium 等。完整列表见 https://www.openeuler.org/zh/sig/sig-high-performance-network。

mainEntity.name: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG 的 Maintainer 是谁？

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-high-performance-network SIG 现有 6 名 Maintainer，包括：huangliming、wuchangye、liuxin。Maintainer 负责代码最终审核与合并。
